title: Fig. 2. Russula fusiformata Y in Species of Russula subgenus Heterophyllidiae (Russulaceae, Basidiomycota) from Dinghushan Biosphere Reserve
author: Song, Yu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 2. Russula fusiformata Y.Song sp. nov., holotype (GDGM75333). a–b. Fruiting bodies. c–d. Basidia. e. Basidiospores in Melzer's reagent. f–g. Basidiospores under scanning electron microscope. Scale bars: a–b = 1 cm; c–e = 10 μm; f–g = 1 μm.
